title: Golden Sandstone Fortress Travel Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Golden Sandstone Fortress Travel Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic historical travel portrait of adult woman with long wavy dark brown hair and calm confident expression at a golden-sandstone fortress. Subject: adult woman with long wavy dark brown hair and calm confident expression wears elegant white summer dress with delicate gray floral patterns, V-neckline, elbow-length sleeves, and cinched waist with full professional makeup, simple gold rings, delicate bracelet, thin necklace, calm confident expression, and natural travel-editorial presence. Scene: historic golden-sandstone fortress with circular stone towers, conical roofs, battlements, and small window openings provides the historic travel backdrop with warm sandstone, fortress towers, small windows, battlements, and late-afternoon architectural depth. Composition: Fixed medium-shot rule-of-thirds portrait with sitting in side profile on a wide textured stone ledge while looking directly at the camera, side-profile body line, direct camera connection, wide textured stone ledge, and cinematic travel framing. Signature Elements: Preserved golden sandstone fortress travel portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-detail cinematic historical travel photography, realistic skin texture, elegant editorial portrait finish, professional color grading, and polished destination-magazine aesthetic. Color Palette: Fixed golden sandstone, warm late-afternoon amber, white dress, soft grey floral pattern, earthy makeup tones, and natural shadow contrast. Lighting: Golden-hour sunlight with warm soft side illumination, long shadows, gentle facial highlights, and calm fortress atmosphere. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
